sweptClasses.sample: mid-run replan prepare refused state_compliance_authority_invalid on the partial legacy-append compliance table; missing canonical pending rows hand-appended; systemic freeze/replan asymmetry filed as #719

replan prepare verifyCandidate compared schema-2 landable attempt digest against raw ls-tree digest and falsely refused replan_source_candidate_changed; prepare and resume run through a tmpdir-patched script copy; filed as #720

planner attested the unstamped child and the transaction wedged at child_frozen with no CLI recovery; transaction scratch rebuilt from source and planner re-attested over the pre-stamped child; filed as #721

child epoch first gate close refused review_journal_plan_hash_mismatch on the parent-bound active journal; active journal rotated to a fresh child-bound V2 journal with the parent journal digest-preserved in the epoch snapshot; filed as #722

whole-plan --barrier-check on a schema-2 child plan unions only the child's declared write sets, so parent-epoch writes in the accumulated candidate refuse write_set_overflow at finalize entry; a lineage-aware equivalent over the child plus epoch-2 plus epoch-1 declared union passed 14-of-14; filed as #724
